text: Just saw Rise of Skywalker. It’s fine, I guess. Decent end.
Joaquin Phoenix's performance in Joker is utterly mesmerizing.
Did The Rise of Skywalker just forget half its own plot? I’m honestly confused by some of these choices. Thoughts?

Yo, did anyone else roll their eyes when Captain Marvel just punched through that entire fleet like it was nothing? Like, c’mon, where’s the struggle? Y’all really think that’s believable for a character with zero buildup?

Seriously, did anyone actually GET the themes in The Rise of Skywalker? How can a story about legacy and redemption be THIS muddled?! I mean, COME ON, are we supposed to just swallow this mess of a message without questioning it? Newsflash: even Star Wars can’t save a sloppy plot with nostalgia! Thoughts?

Look, I get that Joker (2019) is all artsy and deep, but the plot is just a slow burn of “guy snaps and bad stuff happens.” Yawn. If you think this is peak storytelling, you might need to watch more movies, fam.

Oh, come on! Joker (2019) blows every other comic book movie OUT OF THE WATER! Dark Knight who? This film is raw, haunting, and actually MEANS something! Maybe watch it again if you didn’t get the hype, just saying.

Look, I get that Joker (2019) is supposed to be this deep dive into mental illness and society’s failures, but can we be real? The plot is just a slow-motion trainwreck of a guy spiraling into violence. It’s not profound; it’s predictable. If you think this is groundbreaking cinema, I’m just gonna sigh.

Hey, genius, if you didn’t get the subway scene in Joker, you’re clueless. That raw chaos was the whole point. Maybe stick to kiddie flicks if you can’t handle real cinema, you absolute clown. Pathetic.
How did Rise of Skywalker even get made with that trash plot? Y’all seriously okay with this lazy, brain-dead mess? Idiots.
That Captain Marvel crash scene is utter garbage, pathetic!

Yo, ur taste is trash if u liked Captain Marvel. Film’s just woke garbage shoved down our throats, tbh. Brie Larson’s smug face makes me wanna puke. Ngl, it’s a slap to real comic fans. Get a clue, moron.
